extortion.description: [AI generated] Watchfinder & Co, founded in 2002 in the UK, is a leading retailer of pre-owned luxury wristwatches. It offers a wide range of premium brands like Rolex, Cartier, Omega, and many more. Pioneers in their field, they combine e-commerce capabilities with numerous physical stores and showrooms. The firm focuses on authenticity, providing thorough inspection and refurbishment processes for used watches.
